items.title: employer rollout Release
items.description: Release of employer rollout improvements covering employer policy & program management, eligibility, payroll & HRIS sync, and settlement, invoicing & payroll reconciliation across Employer Admin Portal, Employer Integration API, and Employer KPI Cockpit.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve program go-live lead time through stronger launch templates, payroll mapping, and employer onboarding workflows.
Improve enrollment conversion rate by giving employers cleaner launches and fewer early blockers.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve employers live on platform by making launch completion more predictable.
Improve gross margin per active rider by reducing manual back-office overhead in rollout and payroll handling.

productBricks.change: Released reusable employer rollout policy templates and market controls.
Released cleaner payroll and eligibility synchronization workflows.
Released improved employer invoicing and payroll reconciliation flows.
Released reusable HRIS and payroll integration patterns for employer onboarding.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed employer launch workflow updates in Employer Admin Portal.
Deployed rollout integration updates in Employer Integration API.
Deployed launch tracking and adoption visibility updates in Employer KPI Cockpit.

items.title: rider conversion and transparency Release
items.description: Release of rider conversion and transparency improvements covering bike catalog & recommendation, order orchestration & checkout, rider identity, wallet & app experience, and communications & notifications across iOS App, Android App, Rider Web Experience, and Lifecycle Notifications.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve quote-to-order conversion through clearer affordability communication and better order-stage visibility.
Improve time to first confirmed order by reducing avoidable handoff and approval delays.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve active riders by converting more quotes into delivered bikes.
Improve claims cost per active rider by setting better rider expectations and reducing avoidable support churn.

productBricks.change: Released improved bike matching and package guidance for rider selection.
Released clearer order progress, approval, and fulfillment sequencing.
Released richer rider status views, document access, and self-service lifecycle surfaces.
Released event-driven lifecycle messages for order and handover milestones.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed order and lifecycle updates in iOS App.
Deployed order and lifecycle updates in Android App.
Deployed quote and checkout updates in Rider Web Experience.
Deployed rider guidance updates in Lifecycle Notifications.

items.title: partner service workflow Release
items.description: Release of partner service workflow improvements covering dealer & service partner network management, stock, availability & handover planning, service case & maintenance orchestration, and insurance & claims administration across Partner Portal and Partner Integration API.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve order completeness rate through stronger order validation and partner workflow discipline.
Improve reimbursement cycle time through cleaner claims evidence and settlement handoffs.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve active partner coverage by increasing partner confidence in service and payout workflows.
Improve partner churn rate by reducing avoidable friction in dealer operations.

productBricks.change: Released clearer partner onboarding, SLA, and performance governance flows.
Released improved reservation, stock, and handover planning workflows.
Released workflow templates for service intake, repair authorization, and maintenance closure.
Released more structured claims evidence and reimbursement routing.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed service and handover workflow updates in Partner Portal.
Deployed partner status and inventory exchange updates in Partner Integration API.

items.title: fleet pilot Release
items.description: Release of fleet pilot improvements covering pool bike & fleet management, trip, telematics & asset monitoring, service case & maintenance orchestration, and operational data, KPI & analytics platform across Fleet Admin Console and Fleet User Mobile Experience.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve asset availability through better fleet-state visibility and maintenance planning.
Improve fleet task completion with bikes by aligning booking and assignment with real operational work.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve recurring revenue from fleet programs by making the pilot offer operationally credible.
Improve fleet locations live by turning pilot success into an expansion case.

productBricks.change: Released operational booking, assignment, and asset-state improvements for pooled fleets.
Released better telemetry and asset monitoring for fleet operators.
Released inspection and maintenance scheduling support for pooled bike assets.
Released utilization, downtime, and trip-substitution reporting for fleet pilots.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed asset-readiness and planning updates in Fleet Admin Console.
Deployed booking and issue-reporting updates in Fleet User Mobile Experience.
